organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Ben-Gurion University of the Negev is one of Israel’s leading research universities and among the world leaders in many fields. 

It has around 20,000 students and 4,000 faculty members in the Faculties of Engineering Sciences; Health Sciences; Natural Sciences; the Pinchas Sapir Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences; the Guilford Glazer Faculty of Business and Management; the Joyce and Irving Goldman School of Medicine; the Kreitman School of Advanced Graduate Studies; and the Albert Katz International School for Desert Studies. More than 100,000 alumni play important roles in all areas of research and development, industry, health care, the economy, society, culture and education in Israel.

The University has three main campuses: The Marcus Family Campus in Beer-Sheva; the research campus at Sede Boqer and the Eilat Campus, and is home to national and multi-disciplinary research institutes: the National Institute for Biotechnology in the Negev; the National Institute of Solar Energy; the Ilse Katz Institute for Nanoscale Science and Technology; the Jacob Blaustein Institutes for Desert Research; the Ben-Gurion Research Institute for the Study of Israel & Zionism, and Heksherim - The Research Institute for Jewish and Israeli Literature and Culture.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Ben-Gurion University of the Negev

resumePosition.details:
• Program Leadership: Led highly complex, cross-company technical programs such as SAP migration from Azure to GCP, Middleware Sunset, and Environment management.
• Delivery Optimization: Executed delivery with zero downtime and successfully cut the project timeline by 30%.
• Global Team Management: Directed and motivated diverse, global teams, maintaining clear communication and accountability to achieve project milestones across 11 teams and 5 global locations.
• Stakeholder Alignment: Managed executive-level stakeholder expectations across R&D, Operations, Finance, and Business units, ensuring project alignment with strategic objectives and securing necessary resource allocation.
• Tool and Methodology: Leveraged expertise in Agile and Waterfall methodologies, utilizing Jira to optimize processes, enhance documentation, and establish key performance metrics for project success.

• Release Governance: Spearheaded the organization's Release Management process and directed Change Management governance, establishing a controlled path from development to production.
• Impact Metrics: Improved deployment success rate by 80% and eliminated unauthorized changes.
• ITIL Methodology: Led multiple ITIL process improvement initiatives, practices and enhanced IT service maturity.
• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Implemented cross org process, resulting in faster decision-making and a 25% reduction in integration-related delays.

• NOC Establishment: Founded the Network Operations Center (NOC) from the ground up, defining the strategic vision and recruiting/training a 15-person team to build a core competency for operational excellence.
• Observability: Designed and deployed wide monitoring and observability tools, providing 100% visibility into all company SaaS operations and enabling early detection of anomalies and incidents.
• Service Availability: Successfully transitioned the organization from a reactive to a proactive operational model, resulting in a 98% improvement in availability.
• Process Formalization: Formalized ITIL-aligned processes for Incident and Change Management, minimizing deployment risks and lowering MTTR.
• Systems Implementation: Implemented ServiceNow, PagerDuty, CloudWatch, and Splunk systems to drive full visibility, accurate measurement, and comprehensive documentation.

workExperience.title: Service Operations Team Leader & Incident Manager

companyResolutionResult.description:
We are dedicated to transforming lives by improving the journey to a healthy, beautiful smile.
 
Discover your straight path to a bright future at Align Technology. As a part of our smart, diverse and fast-moving global team, you'll make an impact on the market leader that's moving an industry forward. 
 
Want to find out what's next for us—and for you? Follow us on LinkedIn for business updates and check out our current opportunities at www.aligntech.com/careers. 
 
25 years ago, we pioneered the market for clear aligners. Since then, we have continuously innovated with new products and technologies that revolutionize treatments for doctors and their patients. Today, doctors and labs in over 100 markets use the Invisalign system, iTero intraoral scanners and exocad software to improve smiles for patients – from simple tooth alignment to complex corrections, kids to adults, orthodontics to multi-disciplinary restorative treatment. 
 
Learn more about Align Technology and our products: 
www.aligntech.com
www.invisalign.com
www.itero.com
www.exocad.com

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Approximately 36 years before Israel declared independence, a ceremony took place on the barren slopes of Mount Carmel near the Port of Haifa, which was then occupied by the Ottoman Empire. Unknown to the Haifa community witnessing the event, this would be a milestone in history. This first cornerstone embodied an implausible vision of creating a world-class institute of scientific and technological education in the Holy Land.
The story of the “Technikum” – the original German name of the Technion – is a tale of the century. The second industrial revolution created the printing presses and communications infrastructure allowing Jews scattered around the globe to organize in face of rising anti-Semitism. As Jews were often barred from technical education, the establishment of a technical school was a first priority to rebuilding a Jewish homeland. The Technion was to become a unique worldwide university that would precede, create, shape, and protect a modern state.
The cornerstone laid on April 11, 1912, set in motion a century of progress responding to national and global needs. Technion – Israel Institute of Technology would grow rapidly, becoming a global pioneer in fields such as biotechnology, stem cell research, space, computer science, nanotechnology, and energy. 
Four Technion professors have won Nobel Prizes. As it approaches its centennial in 2025 – 100 years after the first class took place – Technion City is a thriving world center of trailblazing excellence in research and teaching for the benefit of humanity, with 18 faculties, more than 14,000 students, 135 academic programs, and 60 research institutes. Since the Technion opened its doors, more than 90,000 Technion alumni have played a huge part in creating and leading the ‘Startup Nation,’ impacting the lives of millions of people worldwide.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Technion - Israel Institute of Technology

companyResolutionResult.description:
The Israel Defense Forces (IDF) is the military of the State of Israel, responsible for the nation's defense and security. Founded in 1948, the IDF ranks among the most battle-tested armed forces in the world, having had to defend the country in six major wars. 

At the age of 18, men and women are required to do mandatory military service in one of the IDF's three branches - Ground Forces, Air Force, and Navy. The Israel Defense Forces is unique in its inclusion of mandatory conscription of women. Men and women of all ranks serve side by side in various positions such as pilots, captains, combat soldiers, intelligence, doctors, technicians and much more. This national service brings together Israelis from all sectors of society, religions and backgrounds. 

The IDF is considered to be one of the world's most technologically-advanced militaries and contributes greatly to Israel's thriving culture of tech start-ups and cutting-edge innovation.
companyResolutionResult.name: Israel Defense Forces

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
The "IDF School of Computer Science," also known as "Basmach," is a program within the Israeli Defense Forces (IDF) that provides advanced training and education in computer science and related fields to soldiers who have been identified as having exceptional talent in these areas. The program was established in the 1980s as a response to the growing importance of computing and technology in the military.
Soldiers who are accepted into the Basmach program receive intensive training in computer science, software engineering, cybersecurity, and other related fields, as well as practical experience working on real-world military technology projects. The program is highly selective and competitive, and graduates are highly sought after by leading technology companies and startups in Israel and around the world.
The Basmach program is part of a larger trend in the Israeli military of investing in high-tech capabilities and developing the next generation of military technology leaders. Through programs like Basmach, the IDF aims to stay at the forefront of technological innovation and maintain its strategic military advantage in a rapidly changing global security environment.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Basmach - IDF School of Computer Science

companyResolutionResult.description:
BioCatch prevents financial crime by recognizing patterns in human behavior.

We continuously collect more than 3,000 anonymized data points – keystroke and mouse activity, touch screen behavior, physical device attributes, and more – as people interact with their digital banking platforms. With these inputs, our machine-learning models reveal patterns in user behavior and provide device intelligence that, together, distinguish the criminal from the legitimate.

Today, more than 30 of the world's largest 100 banks and 287 total financial institutions deploy our solutions, analyzing 16 billion user sessions per month and protecting 532 million people around the world from fraud and financial crime.

Fraud is incessant, pervasive, and ever-evolving. It’s relentless. And that's why, at BioCatch, we fight to make banking safer every day.
companyResolutionResult.name: BioCatch

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
ORT colleges are part of ORT Israel, which was established in 1949 and now includes 150 educational institutions. The network trains students to cope with the accelerated rate of development in the economy and in industry.

ORT colleges devise study curricula adapted to the needs of the country and to future needs, in collaboration with other bodies, such as: the Ministry of Science and Technology, the Ministry of Industry, Trade & Employment, the IDF, high-tech industries and other leading industries in the national economy, both in the private and public sectors.

Our graduates are integrated in the employment market in a wide range of key positions, in high-tech industries, other leading industries, government ministries, in the private market and in a large number of places of employment that require high quality professionals in the technological fields, at all levels.

ORT colleges operate as interdisciplinary education centers, ranging from science and technology studies to the arts, design and communications. The colleges aim to provide a solution for every student, enabling them to successfully meet local and global technological requirements.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: ORT Colleges

companyResolutionResult.description:
Claimyx Financial Solutions delivers a transformative approach to how the US healthcare industry manages its revenue cycle. Today’s RCM workflows are fragmented, manual and heavily dependent on teams navigating multiple systems. Our platform brings clarity and efficiency by unifying data, automating financial operations and reducing the manual processes that slow organizations down.

We build a connected, AI driven automation layer that replaces repetitive work with intelligent, end to end financial workflows. Instead of switching between several disconnected systems, teams operate from a single platform that centralizes data, delivers actionable financial insights, prioritizes actions and enables real accuracy at scale - with minimal human touch.

Our long term vision is to automate the entire RCM lifecycle. From patient validation through billing, cash posting and aging to reconciliations, we’re creating an ecosystem where the revenue cycle becomes a seamless, intelligent and fully mechanized process. This vision is built to drive higher revenue through improved accuracy and fewer human errors, ensure timely submissions, unlock predictable cash flow and support true operational scale - fewer people, more facilities, stronger financial performance.

By eliminating manual processes and enabling deeper financial visibility, we help healthcare organizations maximize revenue, reduce administrative costs and allow teams to focus on what matters most - delivering quality patient care.

We’re currently hiring a Development Team Lead and a Senior Full-Stack Engineer - builders who want to shape the future of healthcare automation while growing in a place that invests in them. If you’re motivated, eager to learn and excited to solve real problems in a critical industry, you’ll feel at home here.

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Reichman University (previously IDC Herzliya), the first private institution of higher education in Israel, opened its doors in 1994 thanks to the vision of Prof. Uriel Reichman. Reichman University's ten schools offer innovative, dynamic undergraduate and graduate programs that educate Israel's future business, juridical, high-tech, communications, economics, and civic leaders. 
All of the academic programs provide students with both a solid theoretical background and the practical interdisciplinary skills that are essential for success in the 21st century. 

The university’s alumni are leading key positions at government agencies, high-tech companies, and financial institutions. 

Reichman University is unique in its educational methods, which are based on an interdisciplinary approach and the teaching of information technology and global markets. It combines theory with real-world experience and provides its students with proficiencies. 

Our basic outlook, which is rooted in the twin concepts of individual freedom and responsibility, emphasizes student entrepreneurship and leadership alongside a commitment to community service.

Follow us on all social media channels >>> https://bit.ly/3TVTCJE

מטרת אוניברסיטת רייכמן (לשעבר הבינתחומי) היא להכשיר את מנהיגות העתיד של מדינת ישראל, באמצעות השכלה בינתחומית, המשלבת ידע תיאורטי מעמיק עם הכשרה מעשית, ובהנחיית סגל מרצים וחוקרים מהאוניברסיטאות המובילות בעולם ובישראל. גישתנו היא הקפדה על מצוינות במחקר ובהוראה, לצד דגש על אחריות חברתית ומעורבות בקהילה. מאז הקמתו, הצליח הבינתחומי הרצליה להיות חלוץ בתחומים רבים ולהוביל מהפכה במערכת ההשכלה הגבוהה בישראל, שאת עקבותיה ניתן לראות כיום במוסדות אקדמיים אחרים.

עקבו אחרינו בכל הרשתות החברתיות >>> https://bit.ly/3TVTCJE

resumePosition.details:
• Led DevOps processes across four development teams, defining and driving the division’s overall DevOps vision and best practices.
• Managed and maintained a production environment of 70+ microservices, overseeing the full CI/CD lifecycle to ensure smooth, reliable deployments.
• Headed a cross-team "Zero Downtime Rollouts" initiative by implementing liveness, readiness, and graceful shutdown practices, ensuring seamless Kubernetes rollouts and saving 40 seconds of downtime per rollout.
• Built an automated "Review Apps" system, enabling on-demand, per-branch environments for feature validation and faster feedback cycles.
• Developed an internal Python-based CLI that streamlined daily workflows for both developers and DevOps engineers, standardizing operational tasks.

• Collaborated with development teams to troubleshoot, resolve technical issues, and optimize development processes.
• Reduced CI/CD pipeline duration by 33% through the implementation of complex dependency logic, optimized GitLab CI caching, and increased transparency of unused packages for developers.
• Monitored system health and optimized performance using tools like Splunk and Skywalking.
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Git and Docker to automate software delivery.

• Selected as a Commander (Mentor) based on performance during the training program.
• Mentored SRE trainees individually, providing guidance and technical support.
• Led training modules for the cohort on CI/CD, Linux Internals, and JavaScript.

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
מחפשים את הדרך לעתיד מבטיח בהייטק? Real Time College סוללת לכם את הנתיב.
משנת 2007 RTC מכשירה אנשי מקצוע מובילים בתחומי הסייבר, דבאופס, פיתוח תוכנה וטכנולוגיות עילית. בוגריה מועסקים היום בחברות הגדולות והמתקדמות בישראל ובעולם.
מה הופך אותנו לייחודיים? אנחנו לא עוד מכללת הייטק. אנחנו בית תוכנה שעובד על פרוייקטים של לקוחות אמיתיים עבור חברות בעלות שם עולמי וחברות ביטחוניות בישראל. כך שאנחנו בעצם מכשירים את הדור הבא של מפתחי הטכנולוגיות שישמרו על בטחונה של ישראל.
אנחנו דוגלים באופן לימודי הייטק היברידיים - שילוב של למידה פרונטלית או אונליין בהתאמה אישית. תוכלו לבחור את האופציה הנוחה ביותר עבורכם ולשנות אותה במהלך הלימודים.
סגל המרצים שלנו מורכב ממומחים מהתעשייה, ותוכלו ליהנות משיעורים פרטיים עמם ללא תוספת תשלום. הקורסים שאנו מציעים נבנו ישירות עם חברות טכנולוגיה מובילות כדי להבטיח הכשרה רלוונטית ועדכנית.
אז אם אתם חולמים על קריירה בעולם הטכנולוגי המסעיר, בואו נדבר ונבנה ביחד את העתיד שלכם.
לפרטים נוספים והרשמה כנסו לאתר https://rt-ed.co.il/.

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
ORT colleges are part of ORT Israel, which was established in 1949 and now includes 150 educational institutions. The network trains students to cope with the accelerated rate of development in the economy and in industry.

ORT colleges devise study curricula adapted to the needs of the country and to future needs, in collaboration with other bodies, such as: the Ministry of Science and Technology, the Ministry of Industry, Trade & Employment, the IDF, high-tech industries and other leading industries in the national economy, both in the private and public sectors.

Our graduates are integrated in the employment market in a wide range of key positions, in high-tech industries, other leading industries, government ministries, in the private market and in a large number of places of employment that require high quality professionals in the technological fields, at all levels.

ORT colleges operate as interdisciplinary education centers, ranging from science and technology studies to the arts, design and communications. The colleges aim to provide a solution for every student, enabling them to successfully meet local and global technological requirements.

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
המרכז האקדמי למשפט ולעסקים- אקדמיה שמחוברת לחיים שלך. 
אנחנו כאן כדי להכין אותך לעולם של היום ,לא לעולם שכבר לא קיים.
המרכז האקדמי למשפט ולעסקים ברמת גן הוא מוסד אקדמי מוביל שמציע לימודים גבוהים ברוח של רלוונטיות, גמישות ומיקוד בקריירה.
זה המקום שבו אקדמיה פוגשת את החיים עצמם: עם תוכניות לימוד מעשיות, מסלולים שמובילים לשוק העבודה, ויכולת ללמוד מהקמפוס או מכל מקום בארץ ובעולם.

במרכז האקדמי פועלות הפקולטות:
👨‍⚖ תואר ראשון ושני במשפטים (LL.B, LL.M)
📈 תואר ראשון ושני במנהל עסקים (B.A, MBA)
🧠 תואר ראשון ושני בפסיכולוגיה (B.A, M.A) 
📊 חשבונאות (B.A)
🖥 מדעי המחשב (B.Sc)
💻 מערכות מידע (B.Sc)
🏥  תואר ראשון ושני בניהול מערכות בריאות (B.A, M.H.A) 
👥 ניהול משאבי אנוש (B.A)  

המרצים והמרצות שלנו הם גם אנשי מקצוע בתעשייה, התכניות כוללות קליניקות והתמחויות אמיתיות, והגישה שלנו מותאמת לסטודנט הישראלי של 2025: 
חכם, עסוק, שורד ומכוון מטרה.

אנחנו לא מדברים בסיסמאות.
אנחנו מדברים בשפה של: 
עבודה במקביל ללימודים
תואר שמייצר תעסוקה
לימודים שנכנסים לך לחיים במקום להוציא אותך מהם. 

לינקדאין הוא לא רק מקום לחפש עבודה. הוא המקום שבו מתחברים לאקדמיה שמבינה עבודה.

companyResolutionResult.description: Rafael Advanced Defense Systems Ltd. is synonymous with dynamic defense, daring innovation, and technological ingenuity. Our innovations are based on extensive operational experience and understanding of evolving combat requirements. They enable the rapid development of effective solutions for complex challenges on a variety of fronts. Always ahead ‒ we ensure ongoing advantages for our global client base. We are dedicated to continuously enhancing our customer service, as well as expanding our global industrial cooperation programs.

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Tel Aviv University believes in pursuing the next big idea, the next challenge, the next mystery that will advance human knowledge and improve all of our lives. 

TAU is the largest and most multidisciplinary university in Israel, comprised of nine faculties, 106 departments, and 90 research institutes. It’s been consistently ranked as the #1 institution outside the United States in producing graduates who successfully raise venture capital for their start-up companies. We encourage our students to dream big and follow their passions.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Tel Aviv University

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
In the academic environment in Israel, the Open University of Israel is similar to other universities in its pursuit of excellence and its commitment to superior scientific and scholastic standards. However, it differs in its organizational structure, its curriculum, and its admission requirements. 

The Open University is open to all those who wish to study a single course or a battery of courses, or to pursue a full program of study toward a Bachelor's degree. Enrollment does not require matriculation or any other certificate from another educational institution. Though applicants are not required to provide proof of prior scholastic achievements, their academic achievements are the key to their success at the Open University. Along with its open admission policy, the Open University demands of its students personal qualities without which academic achievements cannot be attained: ambition, motivation, perseverance, responsibility and self-discipline. Students are required to study on their own, practice at home, actively participate in group learning activities, and meet course deadlines and requirements. 

Since 1996, the Open University has offered programs of study leading to a Master's degree. In contrast to the open admission policy for undergraduate studies, admission to graduate studies is contingent on fulfillment of certain requirements. 
The Open University is flexible in structure and organization. Applicants joining the Open University student body are not required to enroll in a faculty or department, but rather in specific courses. An individual enrolled in a course becomes a student of the Open University. 

The structure of studies at the Open University also differs from the structure customary at other universities, as it is not defined by years. Open University students are not first, second or third year students. Student are entitled to determine their own rate of progress and the degree of progress in not measured by units of time ...
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: The Open University of Israel

companyResolutionResult.description:
Unit 8200 (Hebrew: יחידה 8200‎‎, Yehida Shmoneh-Matayim) is an Israeli Intelligence Corps unit responsible for collecting signal intelligence (SIGINT) and code decryption. 

It also appears in military publications as the Central Collection Unit of the Intelligence Corps and is sometimes referred to as Israeli SIGINT National Unit (ISNU).
companyResolutionResult.name: Israeli Military Intelligence - Unit 8200
